hypothesis_en: Madam President, the Commissioner tells me that in order to cooperate with our timetable, because we have a terrible lack of time before the votes, she refuses to intervene, we thank her, and she sends to the Presidency the amendments that have been accepted and those that have not been.
reference_en: thank you (1.88) Madam Commissioner has said that to cooperate with our timetable because we have a terrible lack of time before the votes that she will not take the floor now for which we thank her and she will hand over to the presidency the amendments which are accepted and which are not I'll let Mr Cocilovo have this so that you have the information and it will be published in the verbatim report tomorrow so we'll vote on that at twelve the debate is closed
source_es: (2.32) muchas gracias la señora Comisaria me comunica que para cooperar con con nuestro horario porque tenemos una terrible falta de tiempo antes de las votaciones renuncia a intervenir se lo agradecemos y traslada a la Presidencia las enmiendas que son aceptadas y las que no yo se lo he entregado se lo envío al ponente Señor Cocilovo para que ~ustedas pue= puedan disponer de esta información que mañana también será publicada en el diario del Parlamento (1.13) se procederá a la votación a partir de las doce horas queda cerrado el debate
